summary: Comprehensive testing of 8 new features (24 test cases) completed successfully. Backend: 21/21 tests passed (100%). All 24 features verified working: Chat with photos, Admin chat in disputes, Cloudinary upload (base64 + multipart), Search autocomplete, Gamified badges, Admin badge CRUD + assign/remove, Admin ratings management, Password change/recovery.
passed_tests: 1. GET /api/subastas/autocomplete?q=cam - Returns matching auctions (Camara Canon EOS 500D)
2. POST /api/upload/base64 - Uploads image to Cloudinary and returns cloudinary URL
3. POST /api/upload (multipart) - Uploads file to Cloudinary successfully
4. GET /api/badges - Returns all 7 default badges
5. GET /api/badges/usuario/{user_id} - Returns user's badges
6. POST /api/admin/badges - Creates a new badge (TEST_NewBadge)
7. PUT /api/admin/badges/{id} - Updates a badge
8. DELETE /api/admin/badges/{id} - Deletes a badge
9. POST /api/admin/badges/{id}/asignar - Assigns badge to user
10. POST /api/admin/badges/{id}/retirar - Removes badge from user
11. PUT /api/auth/cambiar-password - Validates min 8 chars, checks current password
12. POST /api/auth/recuperar-password - Sends recovery email (returns generic message for security)
13. POST /api/auth/resetear-password - Resets password with token (validates invalid token)
14. GET /api/admin/valoraciones - Lists all ratings (with filter support)
15. DELETE /api/admin/valoraciones/{id} - Deletes a rating and recalculates avg
16. POST /api/mensajes - Sends chat message with images array
17. GET /api/chat/conversaciones - Returns user conversations grouped by auction
18. POST /api/disputas/{id}/mensaje - Supports images array
19. Frontend: Search autocomplete shows suggestions dropdown with image+price
20. Frontend: Auth page has 'Olvidaste tu contrasena?' link and forgot password form
21. Frontend: Admin panel has Badges and Valoraciones tabs with full CRUD
22. Frontend: Profile has Mensajes tab, Contrasena button with form, badge display
23. Frontend: AuctionDetailPage shows seller info and badges section (data-testid=seller-badges)
24. Frontend: Chat in AuctionDetailPage supports image upload button (input[type=file][accept=image/*])
critical_code_review_comments: All Cloudinary integration working correctly - both base64 and multipart uploads return cloudinary.com URLs
SendGrid integration configured for password recovery emails
Badge evaluation runs automatically after buy_now, auction close, and rating submission
Autocomplete endpoint properly placed before {auction_id} route to avoid path conflicts
Password validation enforces 8 character minimum on both change and reset
Chat messages support up to 3 images per message
Admin panel has proper authorization checks (require_admin dependency)
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds 7 default badges: Primera venta, 5 ventas, 10 ventas, 50 ventas, 100% positivas, Comprador frecuente, Canario. Test badge cleanup handled in pytest fixtures.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 new features fully tested and working. Backend tests in test_new_features.py cover: autocomplete, cloudinary upload (base64+multipart), badges CRUD, password change/recovery, admin ratings, chat with images, dispute messages with images. Frontend verified via Playwright - search autocomplete shows dropdown with suggestions, forgot password form works, admin badges/ratings tabs functional, profile has messages tab and password change form, auction detail has chat with image upload. Cloudinary and SendGrid are REAL integrations (not mocked). Previous iteration tests (test_admin_ratings.py) still valid for admin panel and rating system basics.

features_verified.feature_1_chat_with_photos: Working - Messages support images array, chat UI has image upload input
features_verified.feature_3_cloudinary_upload: Working - Both /api/upload (multipart) and /api/upload/base64 return cloudinary URLs
features_verified.feature_4_search_autocomplete: Working - /api/subastas/autocomplete returns matching auctions, UI shows dropdown
features_verified.feature_5_gamified_badges: Working - 7 default badges seeded, automatic evaluation on sales/purchases/ratings
features_verified.feature_6_admin_badge_management: Working - Full CRUD + assign/remove badges to users
features_verified.feature_7_admin_ratings_management: Working - List/filter/delete ratings with avg recalculation
features_verified.feature_8_password_change_recovery: Working - Change with validation, recovery via SendGrid email
